channel.title: Posts on GuanJoer Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on GuanJoer Archive

item.title: About Me
item.description:
👋 Hello, I’m Youngmin Jo

I am a Cybersecurity Professional and Penetration Tester currently based in Seoul, South Korea. I specialize in offensive security, specifically focusing on Web, Mobile, and the AI/LLM application security.

Currently, I am a member of EQST (Experts, Qualified Security Team) at SK Shieldus, where I conduct high-level security assessments and research.

🎓 Background & Philosophy

My approach to security is deeply rooted in my background in Physics. Holding a degree in Physics, I apply the fundamental laws of logic and analytical rigor to deconstruct complex systems and identify architectural weaknesses.
